subcodes.title: Words to Hannen, Latimer et al, spoken on 1912-07-31
subcodes.first_line: It is because you do not finish with them. They have their old superstitions and their hearts are attached to them; after a while they become cool again.
subcodes.subjects: @methods of teaching the Cause, @definitions of a Baha'i; qualities of a Baha'i, @spiritual transformation, @second birth
